hero.title: TRINH TRIEU LUAN
hero.subtitle: SEO Specialist & Web Developer
hero.description: Nearly 2 years of hands-on experience growing organic traffic from 0 to 134K+/month. I combine SEO and Web Development — independently handling technical implementation, building custom tools, and expanding into international markets.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: SEO Specialist who codes
about.description1: I'm an SEO Specialist with nearly 2 years of hands-on experience, specializing in building websites from scratch — from brand-new domains (zero traffic) to hundreds of thousands of monthly visits.
about.description2: My key differentiator is combining SEO with Web Development: independently handling technical SEO, building custom in-house tools/plugins, and managing front-end development without relying on a dev team.
about.description3: Currently expanding into international markets (proxy, VPN, APK) with English SEO experience, and integrating AI into every stage of my daily workflow.
